name: @ggui-ai/e2e-mcp-host-simulator
description: Tier-2 E2E harness — headless MCP Apps host simulator for the OSS-local path. Mimics what claude.ai / Claude Desktop / Goose actually do (tools/list resourceUri pre-fetch, /mcp tool calls, bootstrap-token extraction, WebSocket subscribe, submit-action bridge, OAuth flow) against an in-process @ggui-ai/mcp-server `createGguiServer` factory, without ever opening a browser. Also exports the shared `HostSimulator` core consumed by @ggui-private/e2e-host-simulator-remote.
